title: Targa (TRGP) Completes $200 Million Southcross Energy Takeover
text: Targa Resources (TRGP) completes the earlier announced acquisition, which was to be closed by the second quarter of 2022.

title: Targa Resources: More Dividend Growth Coming, Could Even Quadruple Next Year
text: Targa Resources continued to defy expectations with a very strong performance during 2021, which helped see their dividends being increased by 250%. Their financial performance is expected to see another strong increase once again during 2022 with forecast double-digit earnings growth.

title: Are You Looking for a Top Momentum Pick? Why Targa Resources, Inc. (TRGP) is a Great Choice
text: Does Targa Resources, Inc. (TRGP) have what it takes to be a top stock pick for momentum investors? Let's find out.

title: Targa Resources Corp. Announces Quarterly Dividends and Timing of First Quarter 2022 Earnings Webcast
text: HOUSTON, April 14, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) ("Targa" or the "Company") announced its quarterly dividend on common shares and its quarterly dividend on Series A preferred shares with respect to the first quarter of 2022.

title: 5 Pipeline Stocks to Hedge Your Portfolio Against Inflation
text: SUN, DCP, DKL, MPLX and TRGP are among the best inflation-protected investments in today's markets.

title: These 3 Refining & Marketing MLP Stocks Are Worth a Closer Look
text: Notwithstanding high gasoline prices and supply chain challenges, the Zacks Oil and Gas - Refining & Marketing MLP operators like Targa Resources (TRGP), Western Midstream Partners, LP (GLP) and Sunoco LP (SU) should enjoy some upside momentum.
